summary: Iter 84 verification: rules_edition field on Campaign, GMScreen rules-edition toggle, MapMaker tab removal, condition-toggle data-testids, edition-aware AI prompt fragment. ALL CHECKS PASS. Backend 4/4 pytest passed (GET returns rules_edition; PUT '2014' persists; PUT '2024' restores; ai.py contains 2024+2014 mechanic markers and >=6 references to edition_prompt_fragment). Frontend Playwright: rules-edition-toggle visible, both buttons present, gold #D4A017 (rgb(212,160,23)) active styling confirmed, 2014 click triggers PUT and 'Rules switched to D&D 5e 2014' toast, restore to 2024 works. Battle Map / World Map buttons absent (count 0). All 5 condition-toggle-* testids found (blinded/poisoned/grappled/paralyzed/concentrating); clicking blinded persists conditions and renders active-conditions-strip + active-condition-blinded chip; cleared on second click. MiniGameEngine.js confirmed deleted. Sidebar groups COMBAT / WORLD / CHARACTERS / REFERENCE / SESSION all present.

passed: PUT /api/campaigns/{id} with rules_edition='2014' persists (full body required)

ai.py code review: edition_prompt_fragment helper present (line 79); referenced 8 times (lines 116, 443, 563, 678, 1432, 1506, 1615); 2024 block has 'Origin Feats', 'Weapon Mastery', 'Subclasses chosen at level 3'; 2014 block has 'Race grants ASIs', 'Half-Elf, Half-Orc'
Active edition has gold background rgb(212,160,23) == #D4A017
Click rules-edition-2014 -> toast 'Rules switched to D&D 5e 2014' shown, gold moves to 2014
Battle Map / World Map sidebar buttons GONE (count=0)
Sidebar groups present: COMBAT, WORLD, CHARACTERS, REFERENCE, SESSION
CharacterCombatTab data-testid present for: condition-toggle-blinded, condition-toggle-poisoned, condition-toggle-grappled, condition-toggle-paralyzed, condition-toggle-concentrating
Click condition-toggle-blinded -> active-conditions-strip + active-condition-blinded chip render and PATCH persists
Toggle off clears chip (cleanup successful, no dirty state)

minor.issue: Endpoint requires full CampaignCreate body (name field required) for partial updates like rules_edition only. Not a bug for Iter 84 (frontend already sends the full payload), but a partial-update PATCH or making name Optional would improve API ergonomics.

action_items: (Optional) Consider accepting partial PUT bodies on /api/campaigns/{id} or expose a dedicated PATCH so callers can set rules_edition without re-sending name/system. Current frontend implementation works because it likely sends full payload.
critical_code_review_comments: ai.py contains TWO duplicate definitions of generate_ai_content (lines 419 and 540) — the second overrides the first in module namespace, but only line 419 has the @router.post decorator. Dead code at line 540-658 should be removed (also a duplicate process_note_with_ai at 781, get_campaign_tokens at 1226, get_entity_token at 1273). Not a functional bug, but ~600 lines of dead code is a maintenance liability.
edition_prompt_fragment correctly defaults to 2024 and infers from system string as fallback — solid defensive design.
PUT /api/campaigns/{id} requiring full body (CampaignCreate) is not idempotent-friendly for partial updates; consider Optional fields.
seed_data_creation: Campaign b51ba0e9-... rules_edition was toggled 2014 -> 2024 during tests; final state RESTORED to '2024' via both backend test and frontend cleanup click. Test_Orc_Wiz blinded condition toggled on then off — left clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 84 fully verified. campaign.rules_edition restored to '2024' end state. ai.py has dead duplicate function bodies (generate_ai_content x2, process_note_with_ai x2, get_campaign_tokens x2, get_entity_token x2) — not blocking but worth cleanup. PUT /api/campaigns/{id} requires full CampaignCreate body; tests must include name field.
